allow: Bash(node -e "const { AbortController } = require\('node:events'\); const ac = new AbortController\(\); fetch\('http://localhost:1', { signal: ac.signal }\).catch\(e => console.log\('fetch error:', e.message, e.name\)\); setTimeout\(\(\) => ac.abort\(\), 100\);")

Bash(node -e "const controller = new AbortController\(\); controller.abort\(\); fetch\('https://example.com', { signal: controller.signal }\).catch\(e => console.log\('Aborted result:', e.name, '|', e.message, '|', e.cause?.message\)\);")
